title: TechReborn Player Ability Lib Compat
description: Adds compatibility between TechReborn's Quantum Armor flying and PAL
body:
This mod adds support for Player Ability Lib, used by many large mods to supply creative flight and other abilities, to the Quantum Chestplate from Tech Reborn.

Without this mod, the quantum chestplate does not allow creative flight and the logs spam messages such as:

```
Player ability minecraft:mayfly was updated externally (expected disabled, was enabled).  
```
